name: Chocolate Caramel Walnut Fudge
recipeIngredient: 14 oz (1 can) Eagle Brand condensed milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate pieces with the sweetened condensed milk and salt.
2. Remove from heat; stir in the walnuts, caramel topping, and vanilla.
3. Spread evenly into a foil-lined 8 or 9 inch square pan.
4. Chill for 2 hours until firm.
5. Cut into small pieces. Makes 2 lbs of fudge.
